title: Summoned River Star System
content:
See: 
World

Summoned River
 is the Star System that resides beneath the 
Lightning Celestial Realm
.

Structure
[
]

The Star System's Cultivators are almost overwhelmingly female and they all wear military style uniforms, implying they serve organisations of that nature rather than Sects or Clans. They ride into battle on bolts of lightning.

There is a forbidden region of the Star System which consists of a Cultivation Planet surrounded by a vortex. This area is home to a Third Step Cultivator named 
Zhou De
.

There are approximately 5 Seven Coloured Realms in this Star System, through which the 
Outer Realm
 invaded during the second battle of the 
Third War of the Sealed and Outer Realms
. The Star System was completely conquered during this battle.
